name: PostHog
description: PostHog is an open-source product analytics platform. Capture events, analyze user behavior with trends, funnels, and retention, manage feature flags, run experiments, and organize cohorts and dashboards through a comprehensive API.

capabilities.name: events_capture
capabilities.description: Capture a custom analytics event with properties and user identification.

capabilities.name: events_batch
capabilities.description: Send multiple events in a single batch request.

capabilities.name: events_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve recent events with filtering by event type and properties.

capabilities.name: events_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific event by ID.

capabilities.name: persons_list
capabilities.description: List identified users with their properties and event counts.

capabilities.name: persons_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific person by ID.

capabilities.name: persons_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a person and all their events.

capabilities.name: insights_list
capabilities.description: List saved insights in the project.

capabilities.name: insights_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific insight by ID with its results.

capabilities.name: insights_create
capabilities.description: Create a new insight with filters for trends, funnels, retention, or paths.

capabilities.name: query_execute
capabilities.description: Execute a HogQL or other query against PostHog data.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_list
capabilities.description: List all feature flags in the project.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific feature flag by ID.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new feature flag with rollout conditions.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing feature flag.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a feature flag.

capabilities.name: feature_flags_evaluate
capabilities.description: Evaluate feature flags for a specific user via the decide endpoint.

capabilities.name: cohorts_list
capabilities.description: List all cohorts in the project.

capabilities.name: cohorts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific cohort by ID.

capabilities.name: cohorts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new cohort with filter criteria.

capabilities.name: dashboards_list
capabilities.description: List all dashboards in the project.

capabilities.name: dashboards_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific dashboard by ID.

capabilities.name: dashboards_create
capabilities.description: Create a new dashboard.

capabilities.name: annotations_list
capabilities.description: List all annotations in the project.

capabilities.name: annotations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new annotation to mark important dates on charts.

capabilities.name: actions_list
capabilities.description: List all actions (event definitions) in the project.

capabilities.name: actions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new action to group and name events.

capabilities.name: experiments_list
capabilities.description: List all experiments in the project.

capabilities.name: experiments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new A/B test experiment with variants.

capabilities.name: projects_list
capabilities.description: List all projects in the organization.
